top_tweets.text: why did we lose our souls in tech design
top_tweets.author: flealover99
top_tweets.name: slow cheetah
top_tweets.summary_zh: 反思科技設計領域為何失去了靈魂，引發對當前設計實踐同質化與工具化的討論。

top_tweets.text: I'm not gonna lie, the @Meta layoffs are some of the most dystopian I've ever seen. They got told to work from home, they were sent the emails at 4AM in the morning. Those who weren't impacted have software on their computer that tracks their every move, preparing AI to take
top_tweets.author: AIandDesign
top_tweets.name: ⭕ AI & Design (Marco)
top_tweets.summary_zh: Meta 裁員手法極具反烏托邦色彩：凌晨四點發通知、要求在家工作，留任者電腦被裝監控軟體追蹤一舉一動，為 AI 取代做準備。

top_tweets.text:
Pi Founder Chengdiao Fan’s talk at Consensus 2026 was centred on a simple but important challenge:

The frequent misalignment between token design and real product innovation.

Her presentation, “Aligning Web3, AI, and Blockchain for Utility,” explored how tokens can be treated
top_tweets.author: PiCoreTeam
top_tweets.name: Pi Network
top_tweets.summary_zh: Pi 創辦人在 Consensus 2026 探討 token 設計與實際產品創新常見的錯位問題，強調 Web3、AI 與區塊鏈應如何整合以創造真正效用。

top_tweets.text:
A Google Cloud engineer just showed how to build a full app with Claude from scratch

he spent 26 minutes showing exactly what one person with Claude can do, completely free

worth more than any $500 vibe-coding course

here's what he covers:
> raw idea to deployed app in a https://t.co/kHLQfCMofL
top_tweets.author: AnatoliKopadze
top_tweets.name: Anatoli Kopadze
top_tweets.summary_zh: Google Cloud 工程師示範如何用 Claude 從零打造完整應用，26 分鐘展示一人如何借助 AI 完成從構想到部署的全流程。

top_tweets.text:
Be like Lenny (@lennysan)

1. Find a niche you genuinely care about
2. Obsess over creating insanely useful content for that niche
3. Build products that solve their problems better than anyone else
4. Be really nice  
5. Design a life you don’t need a vacation from https://t.co/HqpVSnJSxJ
top_tweets.author: gregisenberg
top_tweets.name: GREG ISENBERG
top_tweets.summary_zh: 以 Lenny Rachitsky 為例：找到真正在乎的利基市場、為該領域創造極度有用的內容、打造比任何人都更好的產品、保持友善，並設計一個不需要逃離的生活。

top_tweets.text:
Reviewing code generated by AI offsets all the productivity gains you get by using AI. It takes a lot of effort to review and validate changes, and you cannot do that for 8 hours per day.

Unless you are vibe coding, the actual productivity gains are marginal in large projects
top_tweets.author: vlad_mihalcea
top_tweets.name: Vlad Mihalcea
top_tweets.summary_zh: AI 生成程式碼後的審查與驗證會抵銷所有生產力提升，除非你只是「vibe coding」，否則在大型專案中實際效益微乎其微。

top_tweets.text:
this kid is 18. his app makes $1.4 million a month

one function: take a photo of your food - get the calories

the entire product is one API call. photo goes in, JSON with calories comes out. frontend shows the number

Cal AI. 15 million downloads. MyFitnessPal acquired them https://t.co/pcgynD86Rf
top_tweets.author: ventry089
top_tweets.name: Ventry
top_tweets.summary_zh: 18 歲開發者靠一個功能月入 140 萬美元：拍照辨識食物卡路里，整個產品就是一個 API 呼叫，被 MyFitnessPal 收購。這案例展示極簡產品的巨大價值。

top_tweets.text: I miss when games did commentary modes. I learned a *lot* of my level/game design sense from Valve designers banging their heads against the wall for why their levels/systems weren't working, and how to tune for each and every moment of a level. https://t.co/OHh87wPWZJ
top_tweets.author: TafferKing451
top_tweets.name: Dillon Rogers
top_tweets.summary_zh: 懷念遊戲的開發者評論模式，從 Valve 設計師逐步調校關卡與系統的過程中學到大量關卡與遊戲設計知識。

top_tweets.text: Fun fact: Tetza’s design was inspired by these turquoise burial masks https://t.co/jtAi8FZZYn
top_tweets.author: megandoesart1

top_tweets.summary_zh: 角色設計靈感來自土耳其綠松石葬禮面具，展示文化元素如何轉化為角色設計語言。

top_tweets.text:
Software is truly dead

There's no reason vibe-coding your own apps, when BDubs is just gonna release bottomless Apps for everyone ☹️
top_tweets.author: beginbot
top_tweets.name: beginbot 🃏
top_tweets.summary_zh: 當「vibe coding」變得普及，軟體開發的意義受到質疑——人人都能輕鬆製作 app 時，傳統軟體開發的價值何在。

top_tweets.text:
BREAKING: Today, we closed the chapter on vibe coding.

I just witnessed my Mac erase a $31B company in 186 seconds.

This is beyond insane. https://t.co/Jtokd39QLS
top_tweets.author: shipper_now
top_tweets.name: Shipper
top_tweets.summary_zh: 見證 Mac 在 186 秒內「抹除」一家 310 億美元公司的展示，宣稱 vibe coding 時代已結束，暗示 AI 編程能力的重大突破。

top_tweets.text:
The Level Design Director of Yoshi and the Mysterious Book was Nintendo Legend Kenta Usui. 

He directed Super Mario Sunshine, worked on the dungeons for Ocarina of Time/Majora's Mask, level design for Yoshi's Island, Mario 64, New Super Mario Bros. Wii/U and more. https://t.co/ue5vVZhiTc
top_tweets.author: Stealth40k
top_tweets.name: Stealth
top_tweets.summary_zh: 《耀西與神秘之書》的關卡設計總監是任天堂傳奇 Kenta Usui，曾參與《超級瑪利歐陽光》《時之笛》《瑪利歐 64》等經典作品的關卡與地城設計。

top_tweets.text: When you live in a community that you mostly experience behind a windshield, you’ll never encounter spontaneous community by design.
top_tweets.author: the_transit_guy
top_tweets.name: Hayden
top_tweets.summary_zh: 當社區設計讓你只能透過擋風玻璃體驗時，自發性的社區互動就不可能產生——這是對汽車導向城市設計的批判。

top_tweets.text:
The man behind this building is a sculptor. He was given 12 days to come up with a design. He had never designed a building. He won the contest. Every part of it, down to each feather, represents one date: August 17, 1945, Indonesia's independence day.

His name is Nyoman Nuarta,
top_tweets.author: anishmoonka
top_tweets.name: Anish Moonka
top_tweets.summary_zh: 印尼獨立紀念建築由雕塑家在 12 天內設計完成，從未設計過建築卻贏得比賽，每個細節包括每根羽毛都代表 1945 年 8 月 17 日獨立日。

top_tweets.text:
Vintage lace reminds us of a time when homes were filled with handmade beauty, tradition, and care. Every piece carried history and craftsmanship passed through generations. 

Today, fast living and modern design have replaced many of those small meaningful details, which is why https://t.co/cBAfeA6JG7
top_tweets.author: EvaLovesDesign
top_tweets.name: Elle Lookbook
top_tweets.summary_zh: 復古蕾絲提醒我們過去家中充滿手工之美與代代相傳的工藝，反思現代設計與快節奏生活如何取代了這些有意義的細節。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容
